diagnosis: The level is an extremely long horizontal corridor (over 100 tiles wide) with almost no vertical variation — the player runs along a flat floor with occasional 3-tile-high platforms and rare 1-tile gaps. The single fall at x=1312 (roughly 41 tiles in) suggests the player misjudged a 3-block jump early on, then continued for nearly two minutes without further deaths but also without meaningful engagement. The comment explicitly requests more 2-block jumps, confirming the jump archetype is repetitive and fatiguing. Completion was false despite low deaths, indicating the player likely quit from boredom rather than difficulty.
